messages.MESSAGE_SESSION_NO_HEADER: Authentication failed. We required access token.
messages.MESSAGE_SESSION_NO_TOKEN: Authentication failed. Token is empty. This incident will record.
messages.MESSAGE_SESSION_NO_USER: User not found. User object is empty. This incident will record.
messages.MESSAGE_SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired or token no longer available. This incident wil record.
messages.MESSAGE_ACCOUNT_CREATED: Your account has been created successfully.

messages.MESSAGE_ACCOUNT_ALREADY_DELETED: Unauthorised request as the account does'nt exist / is already deleted.
messages.MESSAGE_USER_ALREADY_DELETED: Unauthorised request as the user does'nt exist / is already deleted.

messages.MESSAGE_INTEGRATION_VALIDATE_STATUS: We are unable to obtain the most recent records due to the corresponding integration being 'inactive'.

messages.MESSAGE_INTEGRATION_FIELDS_MAPPINGS_UPDA: Field mappings updated between two service providers.
